violations.text: The hand sink in the server station was observed with a condensate line draining into it. A hand sink shall be used to wash hands only. Per PIC, a maintanence service request has been made and is pending repairs. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
The hand sink in the server station was observed with a condensate line draining into it. A hand sink shall be used to wash hands only. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information. The last date of sale were lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Raw animal foods (such as Eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked meats) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was broken down and moved to warewashing area to be washed/rinsed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm) at the bar. Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Various foods prepped on-site were observed with a date mark exceeding 7 days. Foods made/prepped on-site must be disposed of within 7 days. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked (burger and beef tenderloin). New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm) at the dishwasher in the kitchen. A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
The last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. PIC stated once new menus are printed it will be added. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

ROP Lobster was observed thawing with the package still in tact. ROP seafood must be removed from package or thawed with the package not in tact. Lobster was still 37 degrees. ROP Lobster was sliced open. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023

The presence of flying bugs is not controlled as evidenced by multiple flying bugs observed. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC to contact pest control company to inform them of the issue. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
